description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a compact, wide body and sharply swept wings that extend outward and slightly downward from the fuselage. The wings feature blue accent lines and terminate in pointed tips with what appear to be small, integrated thrusters or weapon pods. The rear of the airplane is dominated by two large, cylindrical jet engines mounted close together, flanked by vertical stabilizers and additional angular structures. The cockpit is centrally located at the front, with a faceted canopy and a streamlined nose. The undercarriage is not visibly detailed, suggesting a possible retractable landing gear design. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a predominantly gray color scheme accented by blue and black details.
description: A sleek, angular gray airplane with swept wings, twin rear jet engines, and blue accent lines, featuring a faceted front cockpit and pointed wing tips.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular wings, pointed nose, and central cockpit canopy, with blue accents and wingtip pods visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the low, swept wings, twin cylindrical engines at the rear, and the streamlined, flat profile of the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the two large jet exhausts, angular tail structures, and the full span of the wings with their downward angle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the same low, swept wing configuration and engine placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and downward (anhedral) angle, featuring pointed tips and integrated pods.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers with angular, H-tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a faceted canopy, likely single-seat.
